endpoints.name: Operations_List
endpoints.description: Gets the details of all operations possible on the Microsoft.VisualStudio resource provider.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Accounts_CheckNameAvailability
endpoints.description: Checks if the specified Visual Studio Team Services account name is available. Resource name can be either an account name or an account name and PUID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: Projects_ListByResourceGroup
endpoints.description: Gets all Visual Studio Team Services project resources created in the specified Team Services account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ROOTRESOURCENAME}} with a real rootresourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Projects_Get
endpoints.description: Gets the details of a Team Services project resource.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{ROOTRESOURCENAME}} with a real rootresourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Projects_Create
endpoints.description: Creates a Team Services project in the collection with the specified name. 'VersionControlOption' and 'ProcessTemplateId' must be specified in the resource properties. Valid values for VersionControlOption: Git, Tfvc. Valid values for ProcessTemplateId: 6B724908-EF14-45CF-84F8-768B5384DA45, ADCC42AB-9882-485E-A3ED-7678F01F66BC, 27450541-8E31-4150-9947-DC59F998FC01 (these IDs correspond to Scrum, Agile, and CMMI process templates).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{ROOTRESOURCENAME}} with a real rootresourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Projects_Update
endpoints.description: Updates the tags of the specified Team Services project.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{ROOTRESOURCENAME}} with a real rootresourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Projects_GetJobStatus
endpoints.description: Gets the status of the project resource creation job.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBCONTAINERNAME}} with a real subcontainername. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{ROOTRESOURCENAME}} with a real rootresourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Accounts_ListByResourceGroup
endpoints.description: Gets all Visual Studio Team Services account resources under the resource group linked to the specified Azure subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Extensions_ListByAccount
endpoints.description: Gets the details of the extension resources created within the resource group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTRESOURCENAME}} with a real accountresourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Extensions_Get
endpoints.description: Gets the details of an extension associated with a Visual Studio Team Services account resource.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTRESOURCENAME}} with a real accountresourcename. Replace {{EXTENSIONRESOURCENAME}} with a real extensionresourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Extensions_Create
endpoints.description: Registers the extension with a Visual Studio Team Services account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTRESOURCENAME}} with a real accountresourcename. Replace {{EXTENSIONRESOURCENAME}} with a real extensionresourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Extensions_Delete
endpoints.description: Removes an extension resource registration for a Visual Studio Team Services account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTRESOURCENAME}} with a real accountresourcename. Replace {{EXTENSIONRESOURCENAME}} with a real extensionresourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Extensions_Update
endpoints.description: Updates an existing extension registration for the Visual Studio Team Services account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ACCOUNTRESOURCENAME}} with a real accountresourcename. Replace {{EXTENSIONRESOURCENAME}} with a real extensionresourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Accounts_Get
endpoints.description: Gets the Visual Studio Team Services account resource details.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Accounts_CreateOrUpdate
endpoints.description: Creates or updates a Visual Studio Team Services account resource.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Accounts_Delete
endpoints.description: Deletes a Visual Studio Team Services account resource.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Accounts_Update
endpoints.description: Updates tags for Visual Studio Team Services account resource.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.
